mapper.sql: t.id, t.title, t.summary, t.cover_url, t.status, t.sort_order, t.article_count, t.created_at, t.updated_at, t.deleted_at, t.version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_topic t WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM blog_topic t WHERE t.deleted_at IS NULL AND t.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY t.sort_order ASC, t.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_topic WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'PUBLISHED'
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_topic SET title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, status = #{status}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, article_count = #{articleCount}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_topic (id, title, summary, cover_url, status, sort_order, article_count, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{coverUrl}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{articleCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deletedAt}, #{version}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, status = #{status}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, article_count = #{articleCount}, updated_at = NOW(), deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, version = version + 1
mapper.select: SELECT ta.article_id FROM blog_topic_article ta INNER JOIN blog_article a ON a.id = ta.article_id WHERE ta.topic_id = #{topicId} AND ta.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY ta.sort_order ASC, ta.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_topic_article (topic_id, article_id, sort_order) VALUES (#{topicId}, #{articleId}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_topic_article SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} AND article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE blog_topic SET article_count = article_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{topicId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE blog_topic SET article_count = GREATEST(0, article_count - 1), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{topicId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_topic t WHERE t.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY t.sort_order ASC, t.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_topic WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_topic SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
